title: ICIIT Patna Incubation Programme
tagline: Full-stack incubation for deep-tech startups in ESDM and Medical Electronics.
eligibility: Start-up companies, students, faculty members, or individual innovators
Working in ESDM or ICT domains
Technology areas include IoT, Industrial Automation, Robotics/Mechatronics, Industry 4.0, Healthcare, and related fields
Willingness to be associated with IIT Patna campus

process.title: Preliminary Scrutiny
process.description: Initial screening of the application for domain fit and completeness.

process.title: Pitch to Expert Panel
process.description: Shortlisted applicants present to the Project Evaluation Team. Pitching may lead to full incubation, pre-incubation, or recommendations to improve your plan.

process.title: Offer Letter
process.description: Selected startups receive an offer for full incubation (12–24 months) or pre-incubation (3 months).

process.title: Sign Agreement & Get Going
process.description: Accept the offer, sign the incubation agreement, and onboard into IC IITP facilities.

support: Mentors — business, technology, and product development
State-of-the-art labs: ESDM, PCB Prototyping, Testing & Calibration, Mechanical Packaging, Micro-nano fabrication
Access to service providers: legal, audit, IP, and more

terms: Lab usage charges: only for consumables used (equipment usage and manpower support are free)
Rentals: as applicable if dedicated office space is required

termsNote: The Management Committee of the Incubation Centre is empowered to change or amend the terms. Terms applicable will be specified as part of the offer letter.
about: The ICIIT Patna Incubation Programme is the flagship offering of IC IITP — a ₹47.10 Crore undertaking backed by the Government of India (47%) and the Government of Bihar (53%). Located on IIT Patna's 500+ acre campus in Bihta, Patna, the centre has supported 100+ startups across electronics, healthcare, ICT, and deep-tech domains since its inception (Reg. No. 987, 2015–16). Incubatees gain access to world-class infrastructure, faculty mentorship, and a network of investors and industry partners.
